ep-h-eye: Guest Relations Coordinator · FIFA World Cup 2026 · Miami
ep-h-tag: Guest relations and operations professional — shaped by the highest service standards in hospitality, international cruise operations, diplomatic protocol, and five years of client coordination for international investors in Miami.
ep-r-prop: The service standard starts at Disneyland Paris — and builds from there. International cruise guests, a diplomatic mission's public, and international investors in Miami. The guests will encounter that same level of care.
ep-rp1t: Four languages across the key guest corridors
ep-rp1d: Native Portuguese, professional English and Spanish, working French — covering the majority of Americas and European guest groups as a core operational capability, not a bonus.
ep-rp2t: Guest data and records management at scale
ep-rp2d: High-volume management at consular level — status tracking, discrepancy resolution, data accuracy across parallel channels. Directly analogous to IFES guest profile workflows.
ep-rp3d: Event coordination and invitation management in a diplomatic environment where every touchpoint is observed and quality is non-negotiable.
ep-quote: "His profile reflects institutional reliability, professional integrity, and the capacity to contribute with purpose and effectiveness in demanding environments. I recommend Mr. João Victor Rossi without reservation."
ep-attr: Deputy Consul General · Consulate General of Brazil in Miami
ep-sb-sub: If what you've read adds context to this application, a conversation is one click away.
excl_company: FIFA World Cup 2026 · Guest Relations Coordinator
